rationale: Review 2 directly addresses placement: putting foundational typeclasses AffineAlgGroup and AlgPoints — needed by all algebraic group files — inside Reductive.lean creates an inverted dependency structure visible in the diff, and placing IsUnipotent there is similarly misaligned; acting on these findings produces a meaningfully better-organized file hierarchy. Review 1's import-specificity finding is off-rubric for placement.
